'''Design Team Beta''' was a team of four hand-picked specialists who worked for [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] during the times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Led by [[Tolum Harous]], the other members included [[Diran Miciluz]], [[Mosara Thiirn]] and [[Sere Lure]]. Before [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the team was led by Dr. [[Plo Smarx]], but Smarx was arrested by the Empire and replaced by Harous.<ref name="AIR" />

Design Team Beta developed aquatic vehicles and weapons for the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], being responsible for some of Hydrospeare most renowned products, including the [[Explorer Submergible]], the Imperial [[Aquatic assault stormtrooper|seatrooper]] armor (after consulting with Dr. [[Nashiak Llalik]]) and the [[Aquatic Terrain Armored Transport|AT-AT swimmer]] (although this last one was developed alongside with [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]).<ref name="AIR" />

Due to the quality of Design Team Beta's products, the Empire provided Hydrospeare with two dozen of new projects around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], leading some [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] officers to believe that the Empire was trying to recover [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].<ref name="AIR" />
